prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价为明显负面，涉                        及学术不端（生科院院长论文造假被免职）、师德师风等事件，可能对报考热度产生一定压制；抖音热度为较热（总排名第36位），近年热度排名有所下降；第                        五轮学科评估A-及以上共14个，其中数学A+、化学A+、物理学A、统计学A等与物理类招生专业高度相关，学科实力对考生有较强吸引力；985、211、双一流综合类高校；软科主榜2026年约第21名（2025年曾降至23名，2026年回升至21名），为国内顶尖高校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 本省2026年物理                        类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增长约19.7%，竞争压力显著增大；但南开大学2026年大幅扩招37.1%，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，整体竞争反而缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合                        历年位次波动、2026年计划大幅扩招（主导因素）、本省考生增加及声誉负面信号，扩招对位次的下拉作用远大于考生增加和声誉压制的上推作用；预测最低位次约3015名，区间2683–3347名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 4633 → 2803 → 2308 → 2713 → 2629. The ranking was higher in 2021, but stabilized in the 2300–2800 range from 2022 to 2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 2629. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 23 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 35 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 48, a significant expansion of about 37.1% compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving academic misconduct (the dean of the School of Life Sciences was dismissed for paper fabrication) and teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent. Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 36th overall), but the popularity ranking has declined in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mathematics, A+ in Chemistry, A in Physics, and A in Statistics, which are highly relevant to physics category enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates. It is a 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 21st in 2026 (dropped to 23rd in 2025, rebounded to 21st in 2026), making it a top domestic university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly increasing competitive pressure. However, Nankai University's 2026 expansion of 37.1% far exceeds the candidate growth rate, so overall competition is actually alleviated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan (dominant factor), the increase in provincial candidates, and negative reputation signals, the downward pull on rankings from expansion far outweighs the upward push from candidate increase and reputation suppression. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3015, with a range of 2683–3347.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Physics, Quantum Information Science, Chemistry, Biological Sciences)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Data Science)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Security, Automation, Intelligent Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (Physics, Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite) (Intelligent Science and Technology, Intelligent Medical Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Sciences) (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Sciences, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry)
- Science Experimental Class (Environment and Resources) (Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering, Resource Recycling Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2683–3347, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than 2683, you can aim for the Boling Class or Mathematics and Big Data. If your ranking is around 3015, focus on Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) or Physics and Optoelectronics. If your ranking is close to 3347, consider Material Sciences or Environment and Resources as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 216 → 280 → 252 → 299 → 299, showing an overall backward trend, stabilizing in the 250–300 range in recent 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 299; provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans: 21 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 27 in 2025; 2026 plan is 28, a slight expansion of about 3.7% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition but limited in scope.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (stable at 20–23 in recent years), a top domestic university; 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving academic misconduct (paper fabrication by the dean of the School of Life Sciences leading to dismissal) and teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 36th overall), but popularity ranking has declined in recent years; there was a historical gap in Henan in 2022, which may have a lagging effect; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including 4 A+ disciplines (Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, Mathematics) and 9 A disciplines, covering liberal arts, sciences, economics, and management, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% compared to 75,641 in 2025, significantly increasing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, slight expansion in 2026 plans, significant increase in provincial examinees, and negative reputation signals, based on the 2025 baseline of 299, expansion slightly eases competition but the increase in examinees and reputation suppression dominate; predicted minimum ranking is about 326, with a range of 276–376.
